titleStmt.title: SII 15.147: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 147. (B.K. No. 55 of 1929-30.) PĪRĀPUR, MUDDEBIHAL TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar in the Saṅgamēśvara temple.
This is dated the 3rd regnal year of the king, Saumya, corresponding to 1189-90 A.D. Other details are not given.

It registers a gift of land and house-site to the god Nannēśvara installed by Mahāpradhāna, Dēsiya-daṇḍanāyaka, Hiriya-heggaḍe Nannarasa. The gift was made with the approval of Mahāmaṇḍalēs11vara Virupadēva by Mahāpradhāna, Magaramurāri Lakshmīdēva-nāyaka after washing the feet of Lōka-jīya. Another gift was made to the deity by the Five Hundred including the Seṭṭiguttas of Hagaraṭṭe Three Hundred, Miṭṭi Mācheseṭṭi and others.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇa
pratāpacakravartti bhillamadēvavarṣada 3 neya
savumya saṁvatsaradaṁdu śrīmanmahāpradhā
naṁ magaramurāri lakṣmīdēvanāya
karu svasti śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ viru
padēvarasaranumatadiṁ śrīma
nmahāpradhānaṁ dēsiya daṇḍanāyakaṁ
hiriya heggaḍe naṁnarasaru
tāvu māḍsida naṁnnēsvaradēvara pū
je punaskāra nivēdya naṁdādīvigeya
naḍasuvaṁtāgi yā stha(s�ā)navarippa(ṣṭha)
jīya lōkajīyara kālaṁ karcci dhārā
pūrbbakaṁ māḍi sarbbanamasyavā
gi biṭṭa keyi madaḷige haḷḷihi
baṁdanūra sīmeyiṁ mūḍalu
sadiyagaḍiṁba gēṇa ghaḷeyalu ke
ru 12 Ā dēvālyadiṁ teṁka nivēśaṇa 1
ṇa 1 hagaraṭṭe 300 ra seṭṭigu
tta miṭṭi māciseṭṭi hagaraṭeya stha
ḷada bōriseṭṭi kāraganūra
sthaḷada dēvara kētiseṭṭimukhyavainū
rvvaru koṭṭa dēvamāna hoṁge koṭṭa
lli māna 1 koṁḍalli māna 1 baṁ Stops
Digital edition of SII 15.147 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
